/usr/bin/g++ -g -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/server.dir/chatserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/chatservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/db/CommonConnectionPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/db/Connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/model/friendmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/model/groupmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/model/offlinemessagemodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/model/usermodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/redis/redis.cpp.o -o ../../../bin/server  -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lmysqlclient -lhiredis -lpthread
